revision.comment: Bot: create category from de/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[de:Category:Altägyptischer Obelisk]] [[ca:Category:Obeliscs de l'antic Egipte]] [[commons:Category:Ancient Egyptian obelisks]] [[es:Category:Obeliscos del Antiguo Egipto]] [[fi:Category:Muinaisen Egyptin obeliskit]] [[fr:Category:Obélisque de l'Égypte antique]] [[it:Category:Obelischi egizi]] [[ko:Category:고대 이집트의 오벨리스크]] [[mk:Category:Староегипетски обелисци]] [[pl:Category:Obeliski starożytnego Egiptu]] [[pt:Category:Obeliscos do Egito Antigo]] [[ru:Category:Древнеегипетские обелиски]] [[tr:Category:Antik Mısırlı dikilitaşlar]]
This category was created from de→Wikidata links on [[Category:Sonnenheiligtum_der_5._Dynastie]].
